sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59283" key="koskinopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοσκῐνο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sieve-maker</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:160" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.160</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
